content.en:
The Lord of the Su Domain is an eightfold supreme Dao realm, and he has been stuck in this realm for countless years, and he has not comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of supreme dao.

Now it seems that the Su Domain Lord comprehended the rules of the Fifth Sequence to the Dao, and then succeeded in attacking the Ninefold Dao Realm.

"It seems that the fifth-order supreme rule item was prepared for the Su Domain Lord!"

Ye Tian muttered.

I have to say that the Lord of the Su Domain is from the Sioux tribe, and he almost doesn't need to work hard to have the resources to get his hands on.

Of course, it must also be that the Su Domain Lord has a deep background in the Su Clan, otherwise he will not be able to get that Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

Soon.

The Su Domain Lord has officially broken through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, but his cultivation has not yet stabilized, and it will take a long time to completely stabilize the realm.

Moreover, with the breakthrough of the Su Domain Lord to become the Ninefold Dao Realm, she also became the number one powerhouse of the Winter Night Fortress.

The Lord of the Su Domain was in the stable realm, and Ye Tian also continued to cultivate, preparing for his ascension to the late stage of the Sixth Rank Dao Realm.

At the same time, all the Supreme Dao Realms of the Infinite Domain came to the Winter Night Fortress.

Countless Supreme Dao realms poured into the Winter Night Fortress, forming legions one after another.

And Ye Tian, as the commander, also obtained three legions, among which those supreme Dao realms of the Infinite Domain were among his legions.

As the day of the tribulation gets closer and closer, there are more and more supreme realms gathered.

Of course, there are also Supreme Dao Realms who are unwilling to come over and choose to escape, and they will all be caught by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and the resources will be punished at the lightest, and they will be directly killed at the worst.

Even Ye Tian personally arrested some of the Dao Realms.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance is so strict, there is no way, if you don't do this, I'm afraid that there will be more Supreme Dao Realm escapes, and when the time comes, you won't be able to keep one fortress at all, and it will be easy to be broken by the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

At that time, countless Innate Origin Domains will be breached.

Without these Innate Origin Domains, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance would not be able to grow, and would eventually gradually decline, or even be destroyed by the Supreme Dao Void Demon, which was not the outcome they wanted to see.

Therefore, you must be ruthless when you should be ruthless.

......

Time flies, and before you know it, there are only one hundred solstice time left before the day of the catastrophe.

A mere hundred Dao Epochs is just a very short time for many Dao realms, and the Dao Void Demons will attack the major fortresses at any time and impact the Innate Origin Domain.

After all, if you fight it in advance, you just have to wait for the Innate Origin Domain to fall silent, and you can directly break through the Innate Origin Domain and devour the Innate Origin Domain, without delaying your efforts at all.

Therefore, the major fortresses have been prepared, and all the Dao Realm legions are preparing for battle.

"There are so many supreme realms, I don't know how much they have fallen!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Terran also sent a group of Extreme Dao Realm over, after all, the Terran Race has also risen in the Infinite Domain now, in addition to him, he has also cultivated a lot of Extreme Dao Realm, if not one of them is sent in, it is undoubtedly not suitable.

Of course, the human race currently does not have too powerful Supreme Dao Realm except for him, so he only sent some Triple Supreme Dao Realm, and he can only be reduced to cannon fodder.

However, he was arranged in his own legion, and he could take care of it a little bit, so that he would not fall easily.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian is resting.

Suddenly.

He opened his eyes and muttered, "A Heavenly Blood Sect of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Legion has been dispatched, and it seems that it is coming straight to the Winter Night Fortress. "

The reason why he knew so well was that one of his Supreme Dao Void Demon copy bodies had been mixed into it, so he had first-hand information.

Immediately, he passed the news to the Su Domain Lord of the Winter Night Fortress.

The Su Domain Lord immediately used a nine-pattern supreme dao weapon to spy into the void.

"Sure enough!"

The Su Domain Lord was surprised why Ye Tian knew about it in the first place, but now was not the time to think about this, now he had to stop this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons.

Soon.

The entire Winter Night Fortress was mobilized, and a Supreme Dao Realm blocked the Dao Void Demons from all directions, turning the surrounding territory into a battlefield, preventing those Supreme Dao Void Demons from destroying the nodes of the Winter Night Fortress's Innate Origin Domain Great Array.

And Ye Tian led three legions to guard a fortress node.

In these years, almost all of these Supreme Dao Realms have cooperated with the cultivation battle array, and at this moment, they all cooperate with the battle formation one by one, turning into a huge phantom, even if it is tens of thousands of Triple Dao Realm cooperation battlefields, they can instantly kill the Quadruple Supreme Dao Void Demon.

If there is no battle array, they are really cannon fodder among cannon fodder.

Of course, there is also a battle formation on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian's gaze looked through the layers of void and saw a team of Supreme Dao Void Demons coming towards his node.

"One eightfold to the Dao realm, sixty-six sevenfold to the Dao realm, thousands of sixfold to the Dao realm, and hundreds of thousands of supreme Dao Void Demons. "

Ye Tian instantly judged it.

In addition to these, there are also countless dense supreme demons, which are the first wave of cannon fodder, used to consume the power of the supreme realm, and have no other effect.

I saw that these supreme monsters were surging over in the void like a black tide, boundless, and they looked quite intimidating.

"These supreme monsters, you are responsible for exterminating them!"

Ye Tian commanded.

These supreme monsters are only one or two recultivated to strength, their combat effectiveness is very weak, they are just cannon fodder, there is no need for him to waste his strength.

"Yes, Commander!"

Many supreme realms have responded to the Dao.

Immediately, they killed these supreme realm monsters, and the sevenfold supreme dao realm and sixth-fold supreme dao realm in the legion did not make any moves.

Soon, these Triple Supreme Dao Realms collided with Supreme Dao monsters, and almost all of them were slaughtered.

The dense Supreme Dao monsters were killed and turned into countless corpses, and the blood of the Supreme Dao monsters flowed into the void, turning into blood-colored rivers.

As more and more Dao monsters were killed, Ye Tian gradually realized that something was wrong.

"No, these supreme monsters are not just cannon fodder, they are still arranged!"

Ye Tian saw it.

This is also his comprehension of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, otherwise he really can't see it.

And at this time, the Su Domain Lord also sent news, be careful of these cannon fodder to Dao monsters.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon obviously took the corpse blood of these Supreme Dao monsters as a sacrificial object and arranged it into a magnificent killing array, once the killing array was successfully arranged, it was enough to make these triple and quadruple Supreme Dao realms annihilate in an instant.

However, if the strength is not good, even if you can see it, you will not be able to destroy the big array.

Ye Tian didn't let these Triple Dao Realm retreat, and let them continue to slaughter these Dao Monsters.

Finally, enough killings were made.

Countless blood-colored rays connected the blood-colored rivers, and a terrifying killing array was laid out.

But at this time.

Ye Tian's fifth sequence of Dao rules shuttled in, and he strangled lightly.

Click!

This terrifying killing array directly shattered!
